model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the green rectangle in the center of the image.
The green rectangle is located at approximately (507, 500) in a 1000x1000 coordinate system.
Wait, the image is 1024x768? No, I should use the normalized coordinates.
The green rectangle is a small horizontal bar.
Its center is roughly at x=507, y=500.
